CodeBlockMethod.Name: Warp
CodeBlockMethod.Code:
local warpDataTable = {} warpDataTable.userId = userId
local serializedData = _UtilLogic:TableToString(warpDataTable)
_TeleportService:WarpUserToWorldAndWait(userId, self.WorldId, serializedData)

CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandlePortalUseEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code:
--------------- Native Event Sender Info ---------------- -- Sender: PortalComponent -- Space: Client ---------------------------------------------------------
-- Parameters local PortalUser = event.PortalUser --------------------------------------------------------- self:Warp(PortalUser.Name)
